scripts.test: rm -rf /tmp/questing-unit-tests && tsc tests/paymentAmount.test.ts tests/activeJobsQuery.test.ts tests/stripe.test.ts app/lib/paymentAmount.ts app/lib/activeJobsQuery.ts app/lib/stripe.ts --module commonjs --target es2022 --outDir /tmp/questing-unit-tests --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck && NODE_PATH=$PWD/node_modules node --test /tmp/questing-unit-tests/tests/*.test.js
